_comment: RBA-7 capstone ORACLE — the canonical normalized accessor readout. Both the C++ gtest and the Rust cargo test normalize what their generated accessor reads from the shared batch into THIS exact shape and assert observed == expected against this ONE committed file. Because both compare to the same oracle, observed_cpp == expected AND observed_rust == expected transitively proves observed_cpp == observed_rust (D-RBA-8). Normalization rules: scalars -> value|null; struct -> {score,name}|null; repeated scalar -> [value|null,...]; repeated struct -> [{...}|null,...]; map -> [{key,value},...] (value scalar|null or {...}|null); nested list -> [[{...},...]|null,...]. Metadata maps are emitted sorted by key; absent metadata (C++ nullptr / Rust empty-map) normalizes to {}. The _comment key is stripped before comparison.
